CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Jan-19-2024 Continued To Apr-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2023 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration And To Lift Stay; Declaration Of Claudia E Murga And Proposed Order
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JULIUS GREENE's Motion For Reconsideration And To Lift Stay

Granted as unopposed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Curtis E. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Continued To Dec-27-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JULIUS GREENE'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar per the court's May 8, 2023, order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration

Appearances:
Chris Edgington, Esq. of Ernst Law Group, Tel.805.541.0300, for plaintiff Dejanae Odham, via Zoom videoconference;
Spencer H. Kelly, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel.916.646.8216, for defendant LYFT, INC.;
Naveen Q. Feroz, Esq. of Straus Meyers LLP, Tel.619.595.6020 for defendant Julius Greene, via Zoom videoconference.

The matter was argued At the conclusion of arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling.

Defendant Lyft, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted. The motion to change venue set for May 18, 2023, is off calendar.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling.

(See word minutes for the court's complete ruling.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2023 Continued To May-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT JULIUS GREENE MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Naveen Q. Feroz, Esq. of STRAUS MEYERS, LLP, Tel: 415.595.6020, for defendant/moving party;
Terry Kilpatrick, Esq. of ERNST LAW GROUP, Tel: 805.541.0300, for plaintiff.

Plaintiff informed the court that he did not receive notice of the motion. The matter was discussed. Plaintiff's counsel requested that the matter be continued to allow the parties to confer or for plaintiff to submit briefs. Defendant's counsel did not object. Therefore, per agreement of the parties,

DEFENDANT JULIUS GREENE's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is continued to May 18, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
